antracit.$description: Primary text, dark backgrounds, sidebar. Pantone 431 C.

sv-antracit.$description: Secondary text, subtle elements. Pantone 432 C.

malina.$description: Primary accent, CTAs, active states, alerts. Pantone 1788 C. Max 30% of any screen per brand manual.

sv-malina.$description: Hover state for malina elements. Pantone Warm Red C.

seda.$description: Borders, dividers, card backgrounds on white. Pantone 642 C.

status-green.$description: Delivered/completed status ONLY. Not a general-use green.

page.$description: App page background. Light-mode only in v0.1.0; Phase 2 adds dark.
